event_name: Tank to Tap - Akasha's Wooden Leg!!! Fresh as F$$K
date_text: Wed, Apr 1st • 10:00 AM AEDT - Wed, Apr 1st • 11:55 PM AEDT
description: Hey Sydney — check this out 👀🍺 This Wednesday (ish), we’re doing something seriously special… We’re pouring the exclusive first keg straight from the tank of Wooden Leg — no stops, no delays. Brewed, kegged, driven straight to the pub, and tapped immediately for you to enjoy at its absolute freshest. 🚚 Expected arrival: 10am Wednesday (pending the beer finishing perfectly and being at its best — we won’t rush greatness) - keep an eye on socials for confirmation! We’ll be opening the rooftop early so you can get amongst it — this is as fresh as it gets: tank → keg → tap → your glass. Super limited. Super fun. Something a bit different. We are absolutely pumped to bring this to you — don’t miss it 🍻

date_text: Thu, Apr 2nd • 12:00 PM AEDT - Sun, Apr 5th • 10:00 PM AEDT
description: “We are as passionate about creating first-class craft beer, as we are at building a cool place to enjoy it. From brewing our first batches in the garage of our share house, to carving out our niche in the hospitality industry - we are a small crew of real people with a shared love of crafting exceptionally wonderful beer. We strive to connect with all our ingredients, the land they were grown on, and the people that plant, pick, deliver and pour.”- Precinct Brewing Tap List: - Raspberry Sour - Mango Sour - Pacific Ale - Lager - Pale Ale - Yuzu Wit Bier - Experiment #42 Hazy IPA - Dry Irish Stout - Tropical Fruitburst ALE - WCIPA - Devils Island Tropical Stout - Red
